title: Mass move Archived Items back to board
excerpt: Would love to see a way to mass move Archived Items back to their respective boards.

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see a way to mass move Archived Items back to their respective boards.

posts.author: Joelburden (Joel Burden)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see this feature. I’m about to spend the next 3 hours manually clicking “restore”… “restore”… “restore…”

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday has been great for us. But this seems like a simple fix and frustrating that there is no option.

posts.author: debsherman25 (Deb Sherman)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a great feature so it isn’t frustrating restoring archived items.
